title: <Comp slug> — OOF / test artifacts
subtitle: Stacking pool predictions (private)
description: Derived numpy artifacts for the <comp-slug> stacking pipeline. Files map 1:1 onto scripts/artifacts/*.npy in the project repo. Comp data (train/test) is NOT included per Kaggle TOS; only derived predictions. Schema: oof_<NAME>_strat.npy, test_<NAME>_strat.npy.
